name: Wing Loong II
description: China's primary export armed medium-altitude long-endurance drone, competing directly with the MQ-9 Reaper. Carries precision-guided munitions and provides ISR for nations unable to procure Western alternatives.

specialAbilities.name: Export Accessible
specialAbilities.description: Available for export to nations denied Western drones, expanding Chinese military influence and intelligence access.

specialAbilities.name: Dual ISR/Strike
specialAbilities.description: Carries both EO/IR sensors and guided munitions, allowing seamless transition from surveillance to strike.
